title: [Renseikai] Configure Alert – Partner Config Flag – Out of Duration config disabled – Alert flag recognized by system
description: AC 01.1 — Decision Table — When the "Out of Duration Students" alert config flag is set to disabled for the Renseikai partner, the system recognizes and applies the config.
preconditions:
- Logged in as Renseikai Admin or CM user
- The Renseikai partner has the show_out_of_duration_alert config flag set to FALSE
- A lesson exists at a Renseikai location with at least one student whose lesson date falls outside their course LA duration
steps_actions:
1. "Open the SF Lesson detail page for the lesson with out-of-duration student"
2. "Navigate to the Participants tab → Student Sessions section"
3. "Observe the alert banners area"
4. "Open the BO Lesson detail page for the same lesson"
5. "Observe the alert banners area on BO"
steps_result:
1. "SF Lesson detail page loads"
2. "Student Sessions section is displayed"
3. "The ⚠ Lesson falls outside this student's course duration. banner is not visible"
4. "BO Lesson detail page loads"
5. "The out-of-duration alert banner is not visible on BO either"

title: [Renseikai] Configure Alert – Partner Config Flag – Classroom Capacity config disabled – Alert flag recognized by system
description: AC 01.2 — Decision Table — When the "Classroom Capacity" alert config flag is set to disabled for the Renseikai partner, the system recognizes and applies the config.
preconditions:
- Logged in as Renseikai Admin or CM user
- The Renseikai partner has the show_classroom_capacity_alert config flag set to FALSE
- A lesson exists at a Renseikai location with Lesson Capacity = 2 and 3 students assigned (capacity exceeded)
steps_actions:
1. "Open the SF Lesson detail page for the capacity-exceeded lesson"
2. "Navigate to the Participants tab → Student Sessions section"
3. "Observe the alert banners area"
4. "Open the BO Lesson detail page for the same lesson"
5. "Observe the alert banners area on BO"
steps_result:
1. "SF Lesson detail page loads"
2. "Student Sessions section is displayed"
3. "The X/Y The number of assigned students exceeded the defined lesson capacity. banner is not visible"
4. "BO Lesson detail page loads"
5. "The classroom capacity alert banner is not visible on BO either"

title: [Renseikai] Configure Alert – Partner Config Flag – Out of Duration disabled, Classroom Capacity enabled – Only capacity alert shown
description: AC 01.3 — Decision Table — The two alert config flags are independent. When Out of Duration is disabled and Classroom Capacity is enabled, only the capacity alert appears.
preconditions:
- Logged in as Renseikai Admin or CM user
- show_out_of_duration_alert = FALSE, show_classroom_capacity_alert = TRUE
- A lesson exists with: Lesson Capacity = 1, 2 students assigned, and one student outside their LA duration
steps_actions:
1. "Open the SF Lesson detail page for the lesson"
2. "Navigate to the Participants tab → Student Sessions section"
3. "Observe the alert banners"
4. "Observe the alert banners for out-of-duration"
steps_result:
1. "SF Lesson detail page loads"
2. "Student Sessions section is displayed"
3. "The number of assigned students exceeded the defined lesson capacity. banner IS visible"
4. "The ⚠ Lesson falls outside this student's course duration. banner is not visible"

title: [Renseikai] Configure Alert – Partner Config Flag – Both alerts disabled – Neither alert shown
description: AC 01.1, AC 01.2 — Decision Table — When both alert config flags are disabled, neither alert banner appears on the Lesson detail page.
preconditions:
- Logged in as Renseikai Admin or CM user
- show_out_of_duration_alert = FALSE, show_classroom_capacity_alert = FALSE
- A lesson exists with: Lesson Capacity = 0, 3 students assigned, and 2 students outside their LA duration (both alert conditions are triggered)
steps_actions:
1. "Open the SF Lesson detail page for the lesson"
2. "Navigate to the Participants tab → Student Sessions section"
3. "Observe the entire alert banners area"
4. "Open the BO Lesson detail page for the same lesson"
5. "Observe the alert banners area on BO"
steps_result:
1. "SF Lesson detail page loads"
2. "Student Sessions section is displayed with the list of students"
3. "No alert banners are displayed in the Student Sessions area"
4. "BO Lesson detail page loads"
5. "No alert banners are displayed on BO either"

suite: Configure Alert – SF Out of Duration

title: [Renseikai] Configure Alert – SF Out of Duration – Config disabled – Out-of-duration banner not displayed
description: AC 02.1 — Decision Table + Negative Testing — When the "Out of Duration Students" config is disabled for Renseikai, the SF Lesson detail page does not show the out-of-duration alert banner even when a student's lesson falls outside their course duration.
preconditions:
- Logged in as Renseikai Admin or CM user on SF
- show_out_of_duration_alert = FALSE for Renseikai partner
- Student "Student A" is assigned to Lesson L1 (date: 2026-04-10)
- Student A's LA duration is 2026-01-01 to 2026-03-31 (i.e., Lesson L1 is outside their duration)
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to SF Lesson detail page for Lesson L1"
2. "Click the Participants tab"
3. "Scroll to the Student Sessions section"
4. "Inspect the area above the Student Sessions table for alert banners"
5. "Confirm the student is still listed in the Student Sessions table"
steps_result:
1. "SF Lesson detail page opens"
2. "Participants tab content is shown"
3. "Student Sessions section is visible with Student A listed"
4. "The ⚠ Lesson falls outside this student's course duration. banner is absent"
5. "Student A is shown in the table (record is not removed — only alert is suppressed)"

title: [Renseikai] Configure Alert – SF Out of Duration – Config enabled – Out-of-duration banner displayed
description: AC 02.2 — Decision Table — When the "Out of Duration Students" config is enabled for Renseikai, the SF Lesson detail page shows the out-of-duration alert banner when a student's lesson falls outside their course duration.
preconditions:
- Logged in as Renseikai Admin or CM user on SF
- show_out_of_duration_alert = TRUE for Renseikai partner
- Student "Student B" is assigned to Lesson L2 (date: 2026-04-15)
- Student B's LA duration is 2026-01-01 to 2026-03-31 (L2 is outside duration)
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to SF Lesson detail page for Lesson L2"
2. "Click the Participants tab"
3. "Scroll to the Student Sessions section"
4. "Inspect the alert banners area"
steps_result:
1. "SF Lesson detail page opens"
2. "Participants tab content is shown"
3. "Student Sessions section is visible with Student B listed"
4. "The ⚠ Lesson falls outside this student's course duration. banner IS displayed"

title: [Renseikai] Configure Alert – SF Out of Duration – Config disabled, multiple out-of-duration students – No banner shown
description: AC 02.3 — Equivalence Partitioning — Alert suppression applies regardless of how many students are outside their course duration.
preconditions:
- Logged in as Renseikai Admin or CM user on SF
- show_out_of_duration_alert = FALSE for Renseikai partner
- A lesson exists with 3 students, all 3 outside their respective LA durations
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to SF Lesson detail page for the lesson"
2. "Click the Participants tab"
3. "Inspect the alert banners area"
4. "Confirm all 3 students are still listed in the Student Sessions table"
steps_result:
1. "SF Lesson detail page opens"
2. "Participants tab shows 3 students in Student Sessions"
3. "The ⚠ Lesson falls outside this student's course duration. banner is absent"
4. "All 3 students appear in the table"

title: [Renseikai] Configure Alert – BO Out of Duration – Config enabled – Out-of-duration banner displayed

title: [Renseikai] Configure Alert – SF Classroom Capacity – Config disabled – Capacity-exceeded banner not displayed
description: AC 04.1 — Decision Table + Negative Testing — When the "Classroom Capacity" config is disabled for Renseikai, the SF Lesson detail page does not show the classroom capacity alert even when assigned students exceed the defined lesson capacity.
preconditions:
- Logged in as Renseikai Admin or CM user on SF
- show_classroom_capacity_alert = FALSE for Renseikai partner
- A lesson exists with Lesson Capacity = 2 and 3 students assigned
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to SF Lesson detail page for the lesson"
2. "Click the Participants tab"
3. "Scroll to the Student Sessions section"
4. "Inspect the alert banners area"
5. "Observe the Lesson Capacity field in the Details sidebar"
steps_result:
1. "SF Lesson detail page opens"
2. "Participants tab content is shown"
3. "Student Sessions section shows 3 students"
4. "The X/Y The number of assigned students exceeded the defined lesson capacity. banner is absent"
5. "Lesson Capacity field still shows 2 (data is intact; only alert display is suppressed)"

steps_result:

title: Lesson Detail – Alert Default Behavior – Partner without config – Both alerts displayed as before
description: AC 06.1 — Regression Analysis — For partners without an explicit alert config, the default behavior is preserved: both "Out of Duration" and "Classroom Capacity" alerts are shown when the respective conditions are met.
preconditions:
- Logged in as a non-Renseikai partner Admin (e.g., a core/default partner)
- The partner has no alert config flags set
- A lesson exists at this partner with: Lesson Capacity = 1, 2 students assigned, and 1 student outside their LA duration
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to SF Lesson detail page for the lesson"
2. "Click the Participants tab"
3. "Scroll to the Student Sessions section"
4. "Inspect the alert banners area"
5. "Inspect for the out-of-duration banner"
steps_result:
1. "SF Lesson detail page opens"
2. "Participants tab content is shown"
3. "Student Sessions section is visible"
4. "The The number of assigned students exceeded the defined lesson capacity. banner IS displayed"
5. "The ⚠ Lesson falls outside this student's course duration. banner IS displayed"
steps_data:
1. "Non-Renseikai partner lesson"
2. ""
3. ""
4. "Capacity = 1, Students = 2"
5. "1 student outside LA duration"

title: Lesson Detail – Alert Default Behavior – Renseikai config disabled, other partner – Other partner alerts unaffected
description: AC 06.2 — Regression Analysis — Disabling alert configs for the Renseikai partner does not affect alert display for other partners.
preconditions:
- Renseikai partner has show_out_of_duration_alert = FALSE and show_classroom_capacity_alert = FALSE
- A second (non-Renseikai) partner has no config flags set
- A lesson at the non-Renseikai partner has: Lesson Capacity = 2, 3 students assigned, and 1 student outside their LA duration
steps_actions:
1. "Logged in as non-Renseikai partner Admin on SF"
2. "Navigate to SF Lesson detail page for the capacity-exceeded lesson"
3. "Click the Participants tab → scroll to Student Sessions section"
4. "Inspect the alert banners area"
5. "Inspect for the out-of-duration banner"
steps_result:
1. "Login successful"
2. "SF Lesson detail page opens"
3. "Both students and alerts area visible"
4. "The The number of assigned students exceeded the defined lesson capacity. banner IS displayed"
5. "The ⚠ Lesson falls outside this student's course duration. banner IS displayed"
